launches.name: tappedin.ai
launches.tagline: Custom AI news tailored to your interests in your DM daily.
launches.description: Today if one tries to stay up-to-date with the advancements in AI, almost certainly they will feel overwhelmed with so much noise, irrelevant AI news, and the flood of tools and research papers being published everyday. With tappedin.ai, you stay at the frontier of AI in your field without feeling lost. We deliver only the relevant updates tailored to your interests in a brief digest daily in your DM. You just tell us your interests, and you get exactly the updates that you need.

launches.name: Flowwled
launches.tagline: An AI CFO with an opinion. Buy or skip?
launches.description: Flowwled is an AI CFO for solo founders and freelancers. Log any expense and get a Buy / Don't Buy verdict scored against your business goals. Track runway in real-time. Simulate big moves before you make them. Replace spreadsheets and gut-feeling with clarity.

launches.name: ScanTrade
launches.tagline: Trading AI Chart Analysis
launches.description: Drop your chart and get AI signals in seconds. Support/resistance, trend direction, volatility zones and breakout alerts. No setup, no indicators — pure AI.

launches.name: BeautyLog
launches.tagline: The post-op tracking platform for plastic surgery clinics
launches.description: BeautyLog is a dual-side platform built for plastic surgery clinics: → Clients use AI-guided photography to capture standardized recovery photos with locked angles, lighting, and timestamps. → The system auto-pushes procedure-specific education (double eyelid, rhinoplasty, liposuction) at peak anxiety moments — D1, D3, D7, D14. → Clinics get a unified dashboard with anomaly alerts that flag at-risk patients 7 days before complaints escalate.

launches.name: Happy Horse
launches.tagline: Happy Horse AI Video Generator
launches.description: Happy Horse is the top-ranked AI video model. Generate cinematic video with native audio, text-to-video and image-to-video — try it free in your browser.

launches.name: SEO for AI
launches.tagline: Get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews
launches.description: The free AI visibility check for small businesses. See whether ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Google AI Overviews mention your business, and what to fix if they don't. Three tiers: $15 workbook, $49 launch-priced interactive toolkit, $197 Fix List with the exact paste-ready code. Built for owner-operators in trades like dentistry, plumbing, HVAC, law and accounting. Plain-English fixes you can paste in this afternoon.

launches.name: ChartSignal
launches.tagline: Multi-model AI chart signals for stocks & crypto
launches.description: ChartSignal helps investors read stock and crypto charts faster by comparing multiple AI model opinions on the same chart and turning them into simple indexes, signals, and alerts. Instead of relying on one model or one indicator, you can see bullish/bearish direction, confidence, market trend, volume, volatility, and AI Opinion Index at a glance.

launches.name: Google TPU 8t and TPU 8i
launches.tagline: Two TPUs built for the era of millions of concurrent agents
launches.description: Google's eighth-gen TPUs split into two chips: TPU 8t for frontier model training and TPU 8i for low-latency inference at agent scale. Built for AI teams running production workloads on Google Cloud.

launches.name: svoxx.com
launches.tagline: AI-powered platform to build & monetize marketplaces
launches.description: SVOXX is an AI-powered platform to build, launch, and monetize marketplaces and SaaS products. It offers a scalable, production-ready system with built-in monetization (subscriptions, listings, commissions) and Stripe integration. Create multi-portal platforms, AI tools, and global products with a modern stack (React, Next.js, Go, Docker). No templates — built for real businesses from day one.

launches.name: Spyre
launches.tagline: Spyre is a modern trading infrastructure platform
launches.description: We built Spyre because the tools available to prop traders never matched the standard they were being held to. Spyre is a full trading terminal real-time risk monitoring, TradingView charts, built-in copy trading, and a transparent audit trail on every trade and rule event. Whether you are running a prop firm or trading on one, the platform works honestly in your favour: rules enforced before execution, performance documented clearly, and everything visible in real time. Trusted globally.

launches.name: Video Game Arena
launches.tagline: Vote, Rank & Discover
launches.description: Video Game Arena is a free head-to-head game ranker. Pick a favorite between two video games, see the game climb the global or personal leaderboards. Sign in to build your personal favorite game rankings. Invite your friends and compare your top 10 games! Website was made with human prompts from the AI Replit app on a mobile phone. No human added code to this project.

launches.name: Rose
launches.tagline: AI agents that turn every website visit into a pipeline
launches.description: Rose is a suite of Agents that work every website visit from engagement to conversion... so no buyer ever slips through. Rose deploys 4 autonomous AI agents on your B2B site, engaging visitors 24/7, nurturing via email, identifying hot accounts, and handing off full context to your sales team. No more cold leads. Every visit works.

launches.name: vibecoding.engineer
launches.tagline: The pixel-art cosmos where vibe-coded projects find the star
launches.description: We built vibecoding.engineer — a living, space-themed directory of projects built with AI pair-programming tools like Cursor, Claude, Lovable, Bolt, and GPT. The vibe coding movement is exploding, but there's no canonical place to discover, showcase, or celebrate what people are building with AI. Portfolios get buried in tweets. Projects disappear into the void.

launches.name: AI Video Picker
launches.tagline: Find your perfect AI video tool in 30 seconds
launches.description: Overwhelmed by AI video options? Take our free quiz to get personalized recommendations from 20+ tools including Runway, Kling AI, Pika, and HeyGen. Answer 3 questions about your use case, volume, and budget — get matched instantly. No signup required, completely free.

launches.name: NestUI
launches.tagline: All-in-One AI: Video, Image, Audio & Editor Suite
launches.description: NestUI is the comprehensive, high-fidelity AI generative suite designed for creators. We unite the strongest models—including advanced motion and character-swapping capabilities—into a single, powerful platform for video, image, and audio production. What makes NestUI better? Our transparent, pay-as-you-go pricing. Skip the expensive subscriptions and only buy the credits you need—and they never expire. We also offer 3 free daily credits. Power your creativity with control, and quality

launches.name: PixVerse C1
launches.tagline: Cinematic AI video generation
launches.description: PixVerse C1 helps creators generate cinematic AI videos from prompts, storyboards, and character ideas. It supports action scenes, consistent characters, audio, and up to 1080p output for fast concept videos, social clips, and creative production workflows.

launches.name: Capy: AI Expense Tracker
launches.tagline: Track and categorize your expenses using natural language
launches.description: Track expenses by typing, talking, or scanning receipts. Capy uses AI to understand your spending and categorize it automatically. Set budgets and stay on track.

launches.name: NEO AI
launches.tagline: The AI that doesn't answer. It acts.
launches.description: Meet NEO — the AI that doesn't just answer, it acts. 5 specialized AI brains for business, code, trading, comms, and strategy. No tech experience needed. Beta now open.

launches.name: DabotCentral
launches.tagline: DabotCentral  — One AI assistant for you and your customers
launches.description: AI-powered chat platform with xAI Grok and Kimi K2.5 vision. Voice-enabled conversations, embeddable business widgets, and personalized AI that learns your preferences. The chat is free for basic use, pay for extra features.

launches.name: Image 2
launches.tagline: GPT Image 2
launches.description: Free credits on signup. Image 2 — independent AI image & video platform with perfect text, consistent characters, and cinematic video.

launches.name: Oratrixa Phronosis
launches.tagline: Agents don't act. They propose. Governance decides.
launches.description: ORA is a communication platform built on slow discovery, deep alignment, and emotional safety. Three phases — ORA (connection), ORIGIN (intelligence), SANCTUARY (the safety layer).Modern AI optimizes for capability. ORATRIXA Phronesis optimizes for judgment. A distributed governance protocol that sits between AI agents and execution. Agents don't act — they propose. A deterministic math engine scores every action before it touches the real world. Trust accumulates as a graph.

launches.name: SnapOG - Easy, SEO Friendly Social Cards
launches.tagline: One meta tag for every page, every site, every idea!
launches.description: SnapOG turns any URL into a clean 1200×630 social card in one HTTP call. Set og:image once and your card ships across Slack, X, LinkedIn, and iMessage. Pages render in a narrow viewport and compose into a poster frame so headlines stay readable. Free SEO/OG audit at snapog.com flags broken cards, missing meta, and bad aspect ratios. MCP tools let agents pull cards and audits straight into their workflow. For founders who want quality social card images without designing them.

launches.name: Try it free at tryserieslab.com
launches.tagline: #contentcreator #tiktok #youtubeshorts #aitools
launches.description: 🎬 Introducing Series Lab — the AI episode script generator for content creators! Here's how it works: 1. Create your AI character (e.g. "a sarcastic onion who gives bad financial advice") 2. Pick your platform — TikTok, Shorts or Reels 3. Hit generate → get a full batch of scripts with hooks, body and CTAs 4. Each episode auto-continues from the last one — same voice, same character, forever No more staring at a blank page. No more inconsistent content.

launches.name: Radar
launches.tagline: The missing open-source Kubernetes UI
launches.description: Radar brings your Kubernetes workflows into one fast, open-source UI: real-time topology, resources, events, Helm, GitOps, live traffic flows, security & best-practice checks, image filesystem inspection, and MCP for AI agents. Run it locally as a single binary or self-host it in-cluster with RBAC + OIDC — no account, agents, or cloud required.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
# Radar > [!IMPORTANT] > 📣 **Radar is launching on Product Hunt this Sunday!** > [**Follow Radar on PH** ↗](https://www.producthunt.com/products/radar-7?launch=radar-42edb7b0-e388-4fa8-9ba5-4876c2c0d638) · [We have a new Discord ↗](https://radarhq.io/community/chat) **Modern Kubernetes visibility.**
Local-first. No account. No cloud dependency. Blazing Fast. 🌐 **[radarhq.io](https://radarhq.io)** · [Docs](https://radarhq.io/docs) · [Releases](https://github.com/skyhook-io/radar/releases

launches.name: VibeFrog
launches.tagline: Stop describing UI. Point at it.
launches.description: VibeFrog helps you give AI coding agents better UI context. Hold Alt, hover any element on a page, and click to copy an AI-ready snapshot with structure, styling, and page context. Right-click captures screenshots when visual context matters.

launches.name: Codebook
launches.tagline: The Git for Prompts
launches.description: Codebook scans your local repos, prompts, and git history, then groups prompts by commit so you can find a past feature, review the prompts behind it, and share them in one click. It can also sync prompts into a /prompts folder with GitHub. With codebook, you can also see a prompt dashboard across your harnesses, search and install skills from github in one click, generate diagrams of your codebase, and keep your agents.md and claude.md in sync.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
# Codebook

[![License: AGPL v3](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-AGPLv3-blue.svg)](LICENSE)
![Swift](https://img.shields.io/badge/Swift-6.1-orange.svg)
![macOS](https://img.shields.io/badge/macOS-15%2B-lightgrey.svg)

Codebook is a local-first macOS app for collecting, browsing, searching, and sharing prompt history across local repos and supported AI coding tools.

[Download the latest macOS release](https://github.com/Akshat-Gup/codebook-app/releases/latest)

[Website](https://trycodebook

launches.name: Auditron
launches.tagline: AI Powered SMSF Audit Software
launches.description: AI-powered SMSF audit software for registered auditors in Australia. 95% of your audit completed automatically. RFIs, working papers, audit opinion, all generated. From $29 per audit. Built and hosted in Australia.

launches.name: GPTfy
launches.tagline: The Agentforce Alternative, Built 100% Native on Salesforce
launches.description: GPTfy is the Agentforce alternative built 100% native on Salesforce. Deploy agentic AI with your models (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini), fixed per-user pricing, and zero vendor lock-in. Go live in days with 100+ pre-built prompts, automatic email sync, and enterprise security with GDPR & HIPAA compliance.

launches.name: Sensytalk
launches.tagline: Turn WhatsApp conversations into leads and customers
launches.description: Sensytalk is an all-in-one WhatsApp automation platform built to help businesses capture, engage, and convert leads in real time. Unlike traditional tools, it combines bulk messaging, no-code chatbot automation, shared team inbox, and smart campaign targeting in one place. With advanced segmentation based on user actions (delivered, read, replied), businesses can run highly personalized campaigns and never miss a conversion opportunity.

launches.name: EzMedTech.ai
launches.tagline: EzMedTech | AI Voice Agent for US Healthcare
launches.description: HIPAA-compliant & SOC 2 certified, EzMedTech.ai automates clinic workflows with AI voice and SMS. It handles appointment scheduling, insurance verification, AR follow-ups, and medication refills — reducing front-desk workload. With 20+ native EHR/PIMS integrations, clinics go live in under a week without disrupting existing systems. Trusted by U.S. healthcare providers to streamline operations and elevate patient care.

launches.name: ExaStore
launches.tagline: Launch your ecommerce store in 5 minutes.
launches.description: ExaStore is an AI-powered ecommerce platform that gets you selling online in under 5 minutes. No code, no commission, no middleman — just a fully branded store that is 100% yours.

launches.name: AI Social Post Generator
launches.tagline: Generate viral social posts in 1s with multi-model AI.
launches.description: I built this tool after losing my job to help creators automate social media without rate-limit headaches. Why it's different: 🚀 Dual-Engine: Auto-switches between Groq & Gemini for 99.9% uptime. 🎨 Multi-Tone: Get Professional, Funny, or Sarcastic posts in 1s. 📱 Platform Ready: Optimized for LinkedIn & X with direct sharing. ⚡ Modern UI: Clean split-screen dashboard for speed. 100% free. Solo dev building for my family. Love your feedback!

launches.name: Meta-Architect
launches.tagline: Codex skills for architecture and system design
launches.description: Meta-Architect is a Codex skills bundle that helps you reason about architecture and system design, not just individual functions. Install the package, load it in Codex, and use focused skills to understand systems, explore designs, and surface risks earlier.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet: Production-grade Codex skills and plugin package for architecture, evidence-backed OSS selection, gate-driven review, and release-minded build guidance.

launches.name: Nites AI: Homework Helper
launches.tagline: Struggling with homework? Let Nites AI solve it instantly
launches.description: Nites AI is your personal homework helper designed for students who want faster, smarter learning. Whether you're stuck on a difficult question or need quick explanations, Nites AI helps you solve homework instantly with clear, easy-to-understand answers. ✨ Key Features: • Instant homework solutions • Simple explanations • Works for multiple subjects • Saves time Try Nites AI and make homework stress-free 🚀

launches.name: ClearRead
launches.tagline: Designed for Clarity. Built for Inclusion
launches.description: Simplifies websites to assist reading. ClearRead is a free browser extension that transforms online reading. It combines real time highlighting, Gemini AI-powered text simplification, reader line, dyslexia-friendly fonts, customizable spacing, filters, Focus Mode, and text-to-speech and smart word breakdowns to make complex text easier to understand. Its new Text Helper Popup allows quick highlighting, formatting, and simplification directly on any webpage.

launches.name: bouncy
launches.tagline: Tiny Rust headless browser for scraping.
launches.description: bouncy is a web scraper. Tiny, fast, ships as a single binary — no Node, no Chrome, no Python to install. Point it at a URL and get back the HTML, the visible text, or every link on the page. If the page only renders properly with JavaScript, bouncy will run the JavaScript too. Use it from the command line like curl, or drop it in as a Playwright backend.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet: Tiny Rust headless browser for scraping.

launches.name: Uncluttr - Clean up your tabs
launches.tagline: The tab bar was never meant for 80+ tabs. Let AI organize it
launches.description: You have too many tabs open right now. You know it, your RAM knows it, your fan knows it. Uncluttr replaces the tab bar with a vertical sidebar and uses AI to group your tabs automatically, by project, topic or domain. Inactive tabs get suspended to free memory. Everything persists during crashes and restarts.

launches.name: 10-Hour AI Productivity Stack
launches.tagline: 8 free AI tools to save time every week
launches.description: Most people don't have a motivation problem - they have a workflow problem. If you’re ending your day at 8 PM feeling busy but not productive, your stack is stuck in the past. At AI Fire, we tested 8 free AI tools that save 10 hours a week across research, meetings, writing, and slides. This video shows you how to use NotebookLM, Perplexity, Otter AI, Claude, Gamma, Gemini, AI Studio, and ChatGPT Canvas to build a system that stops repetitive work and actually buys your time back.

launches.name: SKILLOGIC Cybersecurity Course Hyderabad
launches.tagline: cyber security courses
launches.description: A cyber security course in Pune is a great option for students and working professionals who want to build a strong career in information security. The training focuses on practical skills, real-time case studies, and hands-on labs.

launches.name: AI Leads
launches.tagline: Wake up to 10 warm UK prospects daily — we do the outreach
launches.description: UK B2B outreach done for you — more sales, less work, £10/week. Every business day we write your emails, choose your 1,000 UK contacts, run your campaigns, and deliver your 10 warmest prospects to your inbox by 07:00. No agency fees. No contact lists. No time wasted. Early-bird: £10/week, first 500 customers, locked for life. 7-day free trial.

launches.name: Gemini Nano Banana Watermark Remover
launches.tagline: Remove the Google Gemini AI Watermark
launches.description: Google Gemini AI watermark remover from image online. Free online tool - remove Google AiStudio and Nano Banana watermark from image online. Remove visible watermarks from images made by Gemini, Nano Banana, and Google AI Studio.

launches.name: AuthorWidget
launches.tagline: Add beautiful author boxes to your website in seconds
launches.description: Create optimized author profiles with schema markup to improve E-E-A-T, build credibility, and help Google trust your content. AuthorWidget helps bloggers, publications, and e-commerce stores create professional author bio boxes that boost E-E-A-T and search rankings. 🔹 One script tag — embed on WordPress, Shopify, Ghost, Webflow, or any HTML site. 🔹 Schema.org JSON-LD — automatic structured data Google can read. 🔹 Embed analytics — track impressions, clicks, and engagement.

launches.name: FreeInvoiceFlow
launches.tagline: Free online invoice generator with instant PDF download.
launches.description: Create professional invoices in seconds – 100% free, no signup, no watermark. Generate, preview, and download PDF invoices instantly with FreeInvoiceFlow.An easy-to-use invoice generator that lets you build polished invoices instantly with no registration.

launches.name: Retro Bill Classic 2000 Invoicing System
launches.tagline: Vintage aesthetics meet modern security
launches.description: Retro Bill is a high-performance invoicing utility that blends a nostalgic system level aesthetic with the rigorous security standards of modern software engineering. Unlike standard web-based billing tools Retro Bill is built with a focus on data sovereignty and user privacy, ensuring that sensitive financial records remain under the user's control

launches.name: Market Anchor
launches.tagline: Free regional pricing calculator for apps, games, and SaaS
launches.description: Market Anchor is free forever with no limits, helping app developers turn one trusted price into market-aware regional pricing recommendations.

launches.name: Spacebin
launches.tagline: Spacebin v1.1.0: accounts, qr codes, reader mode, and more.
launches.description: After long last, Spacebin v1.1.0 is released. It includes the following new features: ☄️ Added an account system to edit or delete pastes. ☄️ Added a QR code generator for pastes. ☄️ Added a reader mode to view Markdown/text with the proper formatting. ☄️ Moved syntax highlighting functionality to Go.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet: # 🚀 Spacebin [![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/lukewhrit/spacebin/graph/badge.svg?token=NNZDS74DB1)](https://codecov.io/gh/lukewhrit/spacebin) [![GitHub license](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lukewhrit/spacebin?color=%20%23e

launches.name: IS IT SHIT?
launches.tagline: The real-time hype checker for tech trends
launches.description: Tired of the 24/7 hype cycle? "Is It Shit?" is a real-time social experiment in collective art. Everyone is an artist. When you vote, you place a permanent pixel on a 100x100 mosaic, co-creating a historical record of what's hot vs what's bullshit. 🚀 How it works: Claim a spot: Pick your pixel. Cast your vote: SHIT 💩 or HOT 🔥. Seal the history: Once we hit 10k votes, the artwork is frozen forever. Are you an artist or a judge? Join the arena and leave your mark.

launches.name: Appzoku
launches.tagline: Stop guessing your app store screenshots, find what converts
launches.description: Appzoku helps app developers and marketers choose the screenshots that get more installs before publishing. Upload your screenshot variants, and Appzoku analyzes them to: Pick a clear winner 🏆 Score each version 📊 Explain why one performs better Suggest exactly how to improve Instead of guessing or waiting for slow A/B tests, you can make confident decisions instantly. Whether you’re launching a new app or improving conversion, Appzoku helps you turn more visitors into installs.

launches.name: TOW - The Obsidian Workspace
launches.tagline: A modular workspace forged for creators who build.
launches.description: I’m the creator of TOW and founder of Raven Forge Software. TOW was born from frustration with tools that were either too simple or overloaded. I wanted an intentional workspace where every panel and interaction has purpose. TOW is a modular creative environment—more architecture than app. This demo shows the core framework. Feedback on what resonates or needs refinement is welcome.

launches.name: RiseTop
launches.tagline: Free Online Calculators for Finance, Math & Everyday Tools
launches.description: Best free online calculators for mortgage, ROI, salary conversion, inflation, loans & more. Instant results, no signup, 100% private. 100+ tools.

launches.name: DistroFinder
launches.tagline: Find the distributor behind any Spotify song free
launches.description: DistroFinder lets you paste any Spotify track, album, playlist or artist link and instantly see the distributor, label, ISRC, UPC, release date and play count. Free tier includes 10 track lookups per day no credit card required. Pro and Business plans unlock bulk album, playlist and artist lookups. Built for A&R teams, independent artists, music journalists and anyone who needs to know who's behind a release.

launches.name: Catchup
launches.tagline: The CRM for people who hate CRM
launches.description: Stop forgetting people you actually care about. No pipelines. No stages. No "deal values." Just a quiet nudge when someone drifts out of your life. Three features: • F1: Just say it. We remember. — speak naturally, we parse and store • F2: Your relationship rhythm. — passive reminders, not a to-do list • F3: When stuck, we hand you the words. — AI-generated talk tracks in your style 100% free to start.

launches.name: DevForge — Real
launches.tagline: Code like it's your first day on the job
launches.description: DevForge simulates real engineering environments - tickets, codebases, deadlines so you're ready before you ever interview.

launches.name: GitMission
launches.tagline: Master Git by solving real world problems in real projects
launches.description: Master Git with GitMission's interactive missions. Collaborate with a virtual engineering team, use an in-browser terminal, and learn Git by doing – no boring tutorials!

launches.name: Qleik
launches.tagline: Event ticketing, QR check-in, and attendee networking
launches.description: I walked into a room of about 200 professionals at an event and left knowing 3. Not because I didn't try. It's because nobody built the system to bring the right people together. The answer to that frustration became Qleik. Organisers get branded ticketing, tamper proof QR check-in, and live headcount. Attendees get matched with the right people before they arrive. Sponsors get real leads and actual ROI data. This is not another ticketing app. This is qleik.com

launches.name: DBHost
launches.tagline: Postgres without the side project.
launches.description: Managed PostgreSQL hosting for developers. Postgres without the side project. Every database gets PgBouncer pooling and 30-day backups, with a REST API, scoped API keys, and a published CLI when your workflow needs automation. Provision in seconds, connect from any framework - from $0/mo.

launches.name: MetaScript
launches.tagline: A home for thoughtful writing and reading
launches.description: A publishing platform pushing thoughtful writing and reading through custom components like polls, questionnaires and more, built directly into your content.

launches.name: Rescanner
launches.tagline: Know if it's worth flipping before you buy
launches.description: Hey Product Hunt! I built Rescanner after losing money on too many thrift store flips. I kept buying things that looked good but never sold, or sold for less than I paid. So I built a tool that pulls real eBay sold data and gives you a Flip Score before you buy. Type in "Nike Air Force 1" and get the avg sold price, sell-through rate, and your exact profit margin in seconds. Still in beta. First 25 hunters get 1 month free. Would love brutal feedback on the scoring algorithm.

launches.name: GetLicenseReady
launches.tagline: Free NEC 2023 exam prep for electricians — no account needed
launches.description: Getting your electrician license means passing a tough open-book NEC exam — and most prep tools make you pay before you can even try a question. GetLicenseReady gives you 1,600+ NEC 2023 practice questions with detailed code citations, state-specific exam details for all 51 states (questions, passing score, fees, vendor), and a full NEC study guide — completely free, no account required. Built for working electricians who learn by doing, not by reading a textbook.

launches.name: FindFahim
launches.tagline: Saas lifetime deal
launches.description: Expert reviews on SaaS lifetime deals, hosting, and marketing tools, plus digital marketing services to help you save money and grow online.

launches.name: JustTourney
launches.tagline: Run sports tournaments & leagues in minutes
launches.description: JustTourney is free tournament management software for sports organizers. Create football leagues, knockout brackets, or round-robin tournaments — generate fixtures automatically, track scores, manage teams, and share live standings with a public link. ✅ Round robin, single & double elimination, group + knockout, Swiss system ✅ Auto-generated fixtures & standings ✅ Team registration with approval workflows ✅ Public shareable tournament pages ✅ Friendly match scheduling

launches.name: Tutram — Instagram Shop Builder
launches.tagline: Turn your Instagram into a full online store
launches.description: Tutram helps Instagram sellers turn their profile into a full online shop. Customers can browse products, see prices, and place orders instantly — no more endless DMs. Create your store in minutes and start selling smarter.

launches.name: Paritose
launches.tagline: Stay focused with real-time distraction detection
launches.description: Paritose uses camera input to detect when users look away or use their phone, then triggers a loud alarm until the user refocuses. Unlike other productivity apps that use point deductions or other such features, Paritose provides a real-time consequence that is actually unpleasant. The unpleasant experience motivates and forces users to stay focused. Paritose also has other productivity features such as a pomodoro timer and a to-do list for user convenience.

launches.name: Clientum
launches.tagline: The ERP that centralizes billing, clients & finance for SMBs
launches.description: Clientum is an all-in-one ERP built for freelancers, SMBs and professional firms. It centralizes invoicing, treasury, CRM, HR, inventory and accounting in a single platform — so you stop juggling tools and start running your business with clarity. Built in Spain, designed for the way small businesses actually work. Request a demo and see it live.

launches.name: GrantsForYou
launches.tagline: Find grants your business actually qualifies for
launches.description: Find verified U.S. business grants in 60 seconds — small business, startup, women-owned, minority-owned, veteran-owned, nonprofit, agriculture, and SBIR/STTR research grants. Match, apply, and track funding in one dashboard.

launches.name: CopyPenX
launches.tagline: The simplest online notes app — secure, fast, just ₹9/month
launches.description: CopyPenX is a minimal online notes app to save, organize, and access your notes securely from anywhere. No clutter, no bloat — just a clean editor with cloud sync. Free to start, premium at just ₹9/month.

launches.name: QR Suite
launches.tagline: Generate QR codes for everything
launches.description: QR Suite is a QR generation app for creating QR codes for websites, vCards, PDFs, social media pages, apps, business profiles, personal pages, WiFi, email, SMS, phone, events, and more. It also lets you build smart pages for social links and user or business info, so every scan feels more useful and professional.

launches.name: Wavee
launches.tagline: Wave your voice & get text at your cursor
launches.description: Wavee is desktop dictation for Windows and macOS. Wave your voice and get text at your cursor with voice commands, smart cleanup, clipboard mode, transcript history, and workflows that fit the apps you already use.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
# Wavee

![Wavee preview](src/assets/app_screenshot.png) **Wave your voice. Get text at your cursor.** Wavee is a local-first desktop dictation app for Windows and macOS. Hold a hotkey, speak naturally, and Wavee turns your voice into polished text that can be inserted right where you are working. [Download Latest Release](https://github.com/johuniq/wavee/releases/latest) · [Report A Bug](http

launches.name: BukBuk - Alarm App (Morning Routine)
launches.tagline: Wake up with Missions. Set up a Morning Routine
launches.description: Bukbuk helps you build better mornings with smart alarms and customizable routines. Set alarms with missions you must complete to dismiss — solve a math problem, scan a QR code, find a specific object with your camera, shake your phone, or even walk to the bathroom. Link alarms to your morning routine and turn waking up into a daily habit. Stop oversleeping. Start your day with intention.

launches.name: MindForge Arena
launches.tagline: MindForge Arena – Test & Sharpen Your Intelligence
launches.description: 🧠 MindForge Arena – Train Your Brain Like a Weapon Think faster. React smarter. Win sharper. ⚔️ What you get: • IQ tests across logic, memory, math & patterns • 100+ adaptive challenges • Real-time PvP brain battles 🌍 • Global leaderboard & rankings • Deep performance tracking 🎯 Built for students, competitors, and anyone who wants a mental edge. 🚀 Stop guessing your IQ. Start upgrading it. 📲 Download now: 🔗 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.devstudio.iqpro

launches.name: SPADES Music App
launches.tagline: Free offline Windows music player — no internet, no account
launches.description: SPADES Music App is a completely free offline music player for Windows built in Flutter by a 16 year old self taught developer from Melbourne, Australia. Play your local music files without needing Spotify or an internet connection. No ads, no data collection, no account required. Features include folder watching, synced lyrics via LRCLIB, queue management and instant search.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
# SPADES Music App 🎵

> A free, offline Windows music player built with Flutter — no ads, no internet required, no account needed.

launches.name: Suzume Mail for Mac (Prelaunch)
launches.tagline: A calm, fast Mac mail app. A modern homage to Sparrow Mail.
launches.description: Suzume keeps the speed and personality of classic desktop mail while cutting clutter. Text-first reading, quick reply flow, and local-first privacy. Public launch target is June 2026, with an early adopter pre-launch price of $9.99 for the first 100 supporters.

launches.name: Formattery
launches.tagline: On-device file converter for Apple devices
launches.description: Formattery is a file converter for iPhone, iPad, and Mac that runs entirely on-device. Images, PDFs, video transcoding, and OCR — no upload, no cloud, no account. Built solo. Stack is Core Image, ImageIO, AVFoundation, PDFKit, and Vision — Apple frameworks all the way down, which is also why some niche formats just aren't supported.
